output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?birthplace ?birthplaceLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P27 wd:Q20 ; p:P2020 ?statement ; wdt:P19 ?birthplace .
  ?statement ps:P2020 wd:Q526195 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?start) , 1 , 4) <= "2007" && SUBSTR(STR(?end) , 1 , 4) >= "2007")
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?birthplace rdfs:label ?birthplaceLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?birthplaceLabel) = "en")
  }
}

```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?birthplace ?birthplaceLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P27 wd:Q20 ; p:P2020 ?statement ; wdt:P19 ?birthplace .
  ?statement ps:P2020 wd:Q526195 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?start) , 1 , 4) <= "2007" && SUBSTR(STR(?end) , 1 , 4) >= "2007")
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?birthplace rdfs:label ?birthplaceLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?birthplaceLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```
